slides.title: Execution Thesis
slides.subtitle: Tight scope, visible owners, and measurable progress

slides.title: Strategic Focus
slides.subtitle: Primary narrative and operator checklist
bullets: Constrain the initial release to one measurable workflow.
Define success metrics before expanding scope.
Run weekly review against shipping and QA signals.
Document every decision that should become default behavior.

slides.title: Core Pillars
slides.subtitle: What keeps the deck generator trustworthy

cards.title: Reliable Builder
cards.body: Use deterministic layout logic as the baseline path.

cards.title: Strict QA
cards.body: Fail on overflow, overlap, weak visual fill, and design rule regressions.

cards.title: Benchmark Loop
cards.body: Re-run multiple synthetic builds before shipping renderer changes.
